title: Window Size
description: Permanently modify the Minecraft game's (non-fullscreen) window size without having to edit options.txt!

---

Permanently modify the Minecraft game's (non-fullscreen) window size without having to edit options.txt! Simply resizing the window will automatically update the `overrideWidth` and `overrideHeight` properties in your options.txt, plus the video options screen in game will have a new slider for windowed resolution!

![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hfMaJXAJ/images/69407dd8240a6ec4edbc2f01f07f98ef976e3286.png)
